description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 4. Prompt and output-structure upgrades for specificity preservation**.

Goal: strengthen observer instructions so extracted observations keep exact numbers, counts, list structure, distinguishing attributes, constraints, paths, commands, and rejected alternatives when they matter.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/agents.ts`
- prompt-parse tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit`

Worker notes:
- this is a prompt-quality ticket, but it should still be validated by behavior tests rather than prompt diff alone
- preserve the existing user-assertion vs question framing
- improve specificity without making the prompt so long/noisy that it becomes brittle
title: Strengthen observer prompts to preserve exact structure, numbers, constraints, and distinctions
